Real bug found live: "India" picked "British Indian Ocean Territory" on Workday

workday.js has its own dropdown/listbox matching (afjWorkdayPickDropdownOption) and its own virtualized-autocomplete matching (afjWorkdayClickVirtualizedOption) — both reimplemented raw substring matching instead of routing through formatConvert.js's word-boundary-safe matchOption(), the exact class of bug already fixed there once (India/Norway). This fixture exercises workday.js's own functions directly, not the generic engine, since that's where the bug actually lived.

running…
